falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a grinding recovery, not a V-shaped spike to new highs; this would signal a blowoff top continuation rather than bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 relies on elevated volatility compression dynamics; sustained sub-12.50 VIX would indicate complacency has fully reset, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal which depends on unresolved volatility tension

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety/rate-cut panic rather than the inflationary/reflationary bottom pattern of August 2024, proving the macro regime has shifted and the pattern match is spurious

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
